fields.name: Size Class
fields.definition:
Tells lightmapper desired res for structure bitmaps.
Numbers in parens are final sizes after compression

fields.name: structure vertex sink#this is the most that we can sink a soft surface link snow in the structure_bsp via vertex painting.
default instance fade start pixels#>end, pixel size we start stippling out. code default 36
default instance fade end pixels#<start, pixel size where we no longer render. code default 30
Clones
fields.definition:
Describes which other bsps are physical 'clones' of this bsp
This is used to determine how to attach 'position-only' elements, like decorators, to the bsps:
Each clone gets a separate copy of decorators that are in both.
Non-cloned bsps cannot split decorators this way - the decorator will be given to the lowest numbered bsp

fields.name: custom gravity scale#0==nogravity, 1==full, set the custom gravity scale flag to make this parameter active
cloud scale#mapping to the world unit
Lightmap resolution for each buckets
fields.definition:
relative to world unit per texel. default:
1-> 1
2-> 4
2-> 16
3-> 64
5-> 128
6-> 256
7-> 512

fields.name: analytical light bounce modifier (when per bsp flag is on)
non analytical light bounce modifier (when per bsp flag is on)
extra lighting bsp flags#neighbor bsp that occlude or contribute light (including bounce light)
parent object#if an object with this name exists, we attach to it as a child
attenuation distances
fields.definition: these settings vary how the sound fades as you move closer or further away from it.

fields.name: don't obstruct distance:world units#don't obstruct below this distance
don't play distance:world units#don't play below this distance
attack distance:world units#start playing at full volume at this distance
minimum distance:world units#start attenuating at this distance
sustain begin distance:world units#set attenuation to sustain db at this distance
sustain end distance:world units#continue attenuating to silence at this distance
maximum distance:world units#the distance beyond which this sound is no longer audible
sustain db:dB#the amount of attenuation between sustain begin and end
weather sound#plays when rain is active, weather rate gets applied to scale.
entry sound#plays when entering this area
exit sound#plays when leaving this area
cluster camera_fx tag:if empty, uses default#if empty, uses default
forced exposure:stops#the target exposure (ONLY USED WHEN FORCE EXPOSURE IS CHECKED)
forced auto-exposure screen brightness:[0.0001-1]#how bright you want the screen to be (ONLY USED WHEN FORCE AUTO EXPOSURE IS CHECKED)

options: ray trace adjacent bsps on sky hits
lightmaps final gather ignores backfacing hits
not a normally playable space in an MP map (check this on shared BSPs)
dont use extra lighting bsps for cubemaps
analytical bounce uses per bsp setting
use adjacent cluster as portal scale
use adjacent cluster as exterior scale
